pages.title: Futon Arms with Special Features
pages.description:
Owner written blog to help in finding the right mattress for you FUTON ARMS WITH SPECIAL FEATURES Night & Day's futon frame collection offers an array of arm styles and finishes to choose from when decorating your space. This blog will highlight the special features of the Portofino, Sunrise, and Venice frames. The Portofino arm has two features - a two-section tray for your remote or accessories when opened on top and a magazine rack on the side. The arm is 5” wide, 23-⅝” tall, with a 6” half-circle leg on the front and back. Of course, the width is perfect for placing your drink or snacks on top when it is closed. Portofino is 84-⅞” in full size and 90-¼” in queen size, available in Black Walnut, Cherry, Chocolate (pictured), and Natural. The Sunrise features a tray arm with 16 open slats that can be folded down when not in use. The tray arm can take the place of a small table next to the futon frame. The arm is 10” wide, 24-⅜” tall, with a 3-panel frame wood bottom and 2-½” rectangular legs on both ends. Sunrise is 81-⅜” with trays folded down in full size and 86-¾” in queen size. With trays in upright position, full size measures 98-⅛” and queen size measures 103-½” inches. Sunrise is available in Black Walnut (pictured), Cherry, Chocolate, and Natural. The Venice arm is the only rolled arm in the Night & Day futon collection. The arm is 6” wide, 24-⅝” tall, with an 11-slat accent panel and a 3-½” solid bottom panel. The front and back legs taper to a square. Venice is 85-½” in full size and 90-⅞” in queen size, available in Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, and Natural.

## FUTON ARMS WITH SPECIAL FEATURES

Night & Day's futon frame collection offers an array of arm styles and finishes to choose from when decorating your space. This blog will highlight the special features of the Portofino, Sunrise, and Venice frames.

The Portofino arm has two features - a two-section tray for your remote or accessories when opened on top and a magazine rack on the side. The arm is 5” wide, 23-⅝” tall, with a 6” half-circle leg on the front and back. Of course, the width is perfect for placing your drink or snacks on top when it is closed. Portofino is 84-⅞” in full size and 90-¼” in queen size, available in Black Walnut, Cherry, Chocolate (pictured), and Natural.

The Sunrise features a tray arm with 16 open slats that can be folded down when not in use. The tray arm can take the place of a small table next to the futon frame. The arm is 10” wide, 24-⅜” tall, with a 3-panel frame wood bottom and 2-½” rectangular legs on both ends. Sunrise is 81-⅜” with trays folded down in full size and 86-¾” in queen size. With trays in upright position, full size measures 98-⅛” and queen size measures 103-½” inches. Sunrise is available in Black Walnut (pictured), Cherry, Chocolate, and Natural.

The Venice arm is the only rolled arm in the Night & Day futon collection. The arm is 6” wide, 24-⅝” tall, with an 11-slat accent panel and a 3-½” solid bottom panel. The front and back legs taper to a square. Venice is 85-½” in full size and 90-⅞” in queen size, available in Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, and Natural.

pages.title: Futon Arms with Special Colors
pages.description:
Owner written blog to help in finding the right mattress for you FUTON ARMS WITH SPECIAL COLORS Night & Day's futon frame collection offers an array of arm styles and finishes to choose from when decorating your space. This blog will highlight the special colors of the Bali, Key West, and Raleigh frames. The Bali arm is available in the Classic/Nesting Body frame only. The arm is 2-½” wide and 23.6” tall, featuring a shutter style with a double row of 7 slats separated by a middle wooden piece. Bali measures 79.2” full size and 84.5” queen size. Bali is available in Skye, a striking light green background hue with blue and brown striping (pictured on left); and Brushed Driftwood (pictured on right), a rustic weathered gray hue with subtle tones of brown and blue. The Key West arm is available in a White finish only, perfect for your sunroom or beach house. The arm is 3-½” wide and 23” tall. The arms feature 8 slats that form a slight arc and bordered on each end by beveled decorative legs. Key West measures 81” in full size and 86-⅜” in queen. The Raleigh arm is also available in the Classic/Nesting Body frame only. The arm is 2-½” wide and 23.6” tall, with 7 horizontal slats and a folding tray arm of 4 slats. Raleigh measures 79.2” in full size and 84.5” in queen size. With trays in upright position, full size measures 95.1” and 100.5” in queen size. Raleigh is available in Skye and Brushed Driftwood (pictured) finishes.

## FUTON ARMS WITH SPECIAL COLORS

Night & Day's futon frame collection offers an array of arm styles and finishes to choose from when decorating your space. This blog will highlight the special colors of the Bali, Key West, and Raleigh frames.

The Bali arm is available in the Classic/Nesting Body frame only. The arm is 2-½” wide and 23.6” tall, featuring a shutter style with a double row of 7 slats separated by a middle wooden piece. Bali measures 79.2” full size and 84.5” queen size. Bali is available in Skye, a striking light green background hue with blue and brown striping (pictured on left); and Brushed Driftwood (pictured on right), a rustic weathered gray hue with subtle tones of brown and blue.

The Key West arm is available in a White finish only, perfect for your sunroom or beach house. The arm is 3-½” wide and 23” tall. The arms feature 8 slats that form a slight arc and bordered on each end by beveled decorative legs. Key West measures 81” in full size and 86-⅜” in queen.

The Raleigh arm is also available in the Classic/Nesting Body frame only. The arm is 2-½” wide and 23.6” tall, with 7 horizontal slats and a folding tray arm of 4 slats. Raleigh measures 79.2” in full size and 84.5” in queen size. With trays in upright position, full size measures 95.1” and 100.5” in queen size. Raleigh is available in Skye and Brushed Driftwood (pictured) finishes.

pages.title: Wilderness Log Futon
pages.description:
Constructed of Norway pine, this log futon is skip peeled, which means a little bit of cambium or bark is still on the log, giving it a more rustic or natural log look. Each log has to be hand selected to be just the right diameter and have the right character. The knots on the logs are pronounced or sticking out, which are called character knots. Available in Clear FInish.

Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"H
Queen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H

pages.title: Northern Exposure Log Futon
pages.description:
Constructed of Norway pine, the arms on this log futon are heavy six-inch diameter clean peeled logs that use mortise and tenon construction to show the authentic log character of the futon. Each piece has its own unique charm as no two trees grow the same. Available in Clear or Honey Pine Finish.

Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"H
Queen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H

pages.title: Choosing A Futon Mattress
pages.description:
Owner written blog to help in finding the right mattress for you Choosing A Futon Mattress There are many factors to consider before deciding on a mattress for your futon frame (bifold frame, lounger, or chair with ottoman). Numerous futon mattresses can be used for futon frames as well as platform beds, but there are models that can only be used on platform beds due to their firmness (cannot be folded/bended on a futon frame). Some important considerations include the following: What are the components and thickness (loft) of the mattress, and what are the qualities of these components in comfort and durability? Select a futon according to the thickness and comfort you desire. Inexpensive mattresses may be so thin that you are able to feel the frame beneath. Thicker mattresses may be harder to fold and more expensive. Also, check the materials the futon mattress is made of and how these characteristics affect comfort, weight, durability, etc, of the mattress. Mattresses can be one single material or a combination of materials. Examples include all cotton or foam, a cotton-foam combination, a cotton-wool combination, a foam-polyester batting combination, innerspring, memory foam, etc. CertiPur-US certified foams are made without ozone depleters; made without PBDEs or the following Tris flame retardants: TCEP, TDBPP, TDCPP or TEPA; made without mercury, lead, and other heavy metals; made without formaldehyde; made without phthalates regulated by the Consumer Product Safety Commission, with low VOC (Volatile Organic Compound) emissions for indoor air quality (less than 0.5 parts per million). Click this link to learn more about CertiPUR-US certified foam mattresses: Home - CertiPUR-US . You may find it useful to contact a local retailer and ask what lines they carry and the characteristics of the mattresses. It is particularly helpful if your area has a showroom where you can test the futon mattresses on the frames with both sitting and lying down. Some mattresses are dual-comfort, which feature a softer side and a firmer side when flipped over. These vary in softness and firmness on each side, depending on the materials used on each side. These mattresses are very popular, as they give you a choice for sitting and sleeping, if you choose. If you are keeping the frame you currently have and are replacing only the mattress, you will need to know the size you need for that frame. Here are some suggestions for determining the size mattress you need for an existing frame: (1) You can check your mattress tag for style and dimensions. If you have a tag, either write down the information or take a picture of the tag so that you can show it to the retailer to determine the model and size you previously purchased. (2) If you cannot locate a tag, you can measure the width, length, and thickness of the mattress. You can also take several pictures of the mattress from different sides or angles. (3) If you don’t currently have a mattress to check for measurements, you can measure the seat deck of your frame (where the mattress sits). The widths and lengths vary with the manufacturer, but a full size seat deck for a bifold futon frame will typically measure 54.5” to 55” in width and 70.5” to 74” in length. A queen size seat deck for a bifold futon frame will typically measure 57” to 59.5” in width and 77” to 78” in length. Seat decks on models without “arms” on the ends typically measure longer than models with “arms.” There are enough width and length discrepancies between the two sizes to determine if you need a full or queen size (Full: 54.5-55” W x 70.5-74” L / Queen: 57-59.5” W x 77-78” L). Ultimately, the mattress should be comfortable and provide the right level of support for sitting or sleeping. If you are buying the mattress mainly for guests, a medium-firm mattress should provide the comfort and support for most people that sleep on their side or back. A manufacturer’s warranty against defects in the mattress is also a sign of good quality and provide the buyer with protection against any unforeseen issues with their mattress. Hopefully, these tips will help when you are in search of a futon mattress. Please let your retailer know if you have a specific budget for your mattress, so you won’t be tempted to overspend on your mattress. There are numerous options to keep within your budget when shopping for a frame, mattress, and cover. Head into your store with your list and let your retailer help guide you with your purchase - they are happy to share their insights and experience! Don’t be afraid to ask questions and spend the time needed to make a purchase. Also, your retailer will be happy to write a quote for the items you are interested in, if you are not ready to buy at the time of your visit.

## Choosing A Futon Mattress

There are many factors to consider before deciding on a mattress for your futon frame (bifold frame, lounger, or chair with ottoman). Numerous futon mattresses can be used for futon frames as well as platform beds, but there are models that can only be used on platform beds due to their firmness (cannot be folded/bended on a futon frame). Some important considerations include the following:

- What are the components and thickness (loft) of the mattress, and what are the qualities of these components in comfort and durability?

Select a futon according to the thickness and comfort you desire. Inexpensive mattresses may be so thin that you are able to feel the frame beneath. Thicker mattresses may be harder to fold and more expensive. Also, check the materials the futon mattress is made of and how these characteristics affect comfort, weight, durability, etc, of the mattress. Mattresses can be one single material or a combination of materials. Examples include all cotton or foam, a cotton-foam combination, a cotton-wool combination, a foam-polyester batting combination, innerspring, memory foam, etc. CertiPur-US certified foams are made without ozone depleters; made without PBDEs or the following Tris flame retardants: TCEP, TDBPP, TDCPP or TEPA; made without mercury, lead, and other heavy metals; made without formaldehyde; made without phthalates regulated by the Consumer Product Safety Commission, with low VOC (Volatile Organic Compound) emissions for indoor air quality (less than 0.5 parts per million). Click this link to learn more about CertiPUR-US certified foam mattresses: [Home - CertiPUR-US](https://certipur.us/).

You may find it useful to contact a local retailer and ask what lines they carry and the characteristics of the mattresses. It is particularly helpful if your area has a showroom where you can test the futon mattresses on the frames with both sitting and lying down. Some mattresses are dual-comfort, which feature a softer side and a firmer side when flipped over. These vary in softness and firmness on each side, depending on the materials used on each side. These mattresses are very popular, as they give you a choice for sitting and sleeping, if you choose.

- If you are keeping the frame you currently have and are replacing only the mattress, you will need to know the size you need for that frame. Here are some suggestions for determining the size mattress you need for an existing frame:

(1) You can check your mattress tag for style and dimensions. If you have a tag, either write down the information or take a picture of the tag so that you can show it to the retailer to determine the model and size you previously purchased.

(2) If you cannot locate a tag, you can measure the width, length, and thickness of the mattress. You can also take several pictures of the mattress from different sides or angles.

(3) If you don’t currently have a mattress to check for measurements, you can measure the seat deck of your frame (where the mattress sits). The widths and lengths vary with the manufacturer, but a full size seat deck for a bifold futon frame will typically measure 54.5” to 55” in width and 70.5” to 74” in length. A queen size seat deck for a bifold futon frame will typically measure 57” to 59.5” in width and 77” to 78” in length. Seat decks on models without “arms” on the ends typically measure longer than models with “arms.” There are enough width and length discrepancies between the two sizes to determine if you need a full or queen size (Full: 54.5-55” W x 70.5-74” L / Queen: 57-59.5” W x 77-78” L).

Ultimately, the mattress should be comfortable and provide the right level of support for sitting or sleeping. If you are buying the mattress mainly for guests, a medium-firm mattress should provide the comfort and support for most people that sleep on their side or back. A manufacturer’s warranty against defects in the mattress is also a sign of good quality and provide the buyer with protection against any unforeseen issues with their mattress.

Hopefully, these tips will help when you are in search of a futon mattress. Please let your retailer know if you have a specific budget for your mattress, so you won’t be tempted to overspend on your mattress. There are numerous options to keep within your budget when shopping for a frame, mattress, and cover. Head into your store with your list and let your retailer help guide you with your purchase - they are happy to share their insights and experience! Don’t be afraid to ask questions and spend the time needed to make a purchase. Also, your retailer will be happy to write a quote for the items you are interested in, if you are not ready to buy at the time of your visit.

pages.title: Choosing A Futon Frame
Shop
pages.description:
[Full Catalog](/full-catalog)

[Futon Frames](/futon-frames)

[Murphy Cabinet Beds](/murphy-cabinet-beds)

[Platform Beds](/platform-beds)

[Mattresses](/mattresses)

Today’s futon sleeper sofa can be one of the most useful, versatile pieces of furniture you’ll ever own. As a futon specialty store since 1991, our experience has led us to the very best products available in the futon industry. Rest assured, at Carolina Futons, design, functionality, durability, and comfort are the essential attributes of our futon furniture.

A “futon” is actually comprised of three separate components. The futon sleeper sofa includes: a frame, futon (mattress), and removable cover. Read on to learn more about these separate components.

Your comfort is in the mattress, and comfort is perhaps the most important reason to choose a futon sleeper sofa. Our premium futon mattresses are much more plush, supportive, and comfortable than the mattress that typically comes with a typical conventional sleeper sofa or the thin, lumpy futons sold in other stores. Overstuffed with high-density, furniture-grade foam, these futons will deliver years of sitting and sleeping pleasure. And, unlike the original more common cotton futons, these premium mattresses are hypo-allergenic, lightweight, won’t flatten out or get lumpy with use, or allow moisture and mildew to develop inside the mattress. In addition, these premium futons offer a wide range of comfort levels, from soft and plush to very firm. Or you can choose one of the “dual-comfort” futons—softer on one side, firmer on the other. Perfect for guest rooms!

With a removable cover, you’ll never have to pay for re-upholstering again. To change your style, simply change your cover! A removable cover makes decorating easy and economical, plus futon covers can also be easily removed for cleaning. At Carolina Futons, you can choose from hundreds of basic and upholstery-quality fabric swatches to suit your style. You can also add style and flair to your furniture with custom pillows and bolsters, as well. To help you with your fabric choice, we encourage you to borrow our swatches to take home to coordinate with your decor.

After you have used our Shopping Guide to select the perfect fit for you, how do you get it home? We’ve got you covered again.  [Check out our Getting it Home Options](/getting-it-home)!

pages.title: Haley 110
pages.description:
A popular multi-purpose futon engineered for a medium-firm feel, with generous amounts of highly-resilient foam and polyester.

Characteristics
Comfort Level - A not too soft, not too firm feel

Durability - 10-12+ years, designed to resist changes in support for years

Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to perform inside an 8" border)

Weight - Per full size, 40 pounds

Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed

Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame



Construction
A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture.

9" of 2-pound density foam provides the ability to keep the mattress looking and feeling great.

The flame-retardant rayon wrap and polyester protects the mattress and gives a clean, finished look.

Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel.

The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover.

Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon.

Box Edges: For a TRUE reading of thickness.

Overstuffed: Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping.

Tape Edge Closure: Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look."

Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. Our "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.

pages.title: About
pages.description:
Carolina Futons gives each customer the attention and service only an in-store visit can provide, taking the time to show and demonstrate our quality collection of Murphy cabinets, futon frames, and platform beds, as well as allowing customers to test all of our excellent mattresses in the showroom. About Us Richard and Liz Sims started Sims' Futon Gallery (now Carolina Futons) in 1991 in the city of Hendersonville, NC. The Sims gained a loyal customer base with their honesty and integrity, fair pricing, great selection of high-quality products, and outstanding service in their 30 years in business. After making the decision to retire in 2021, Brenda and Howard Deal saw the opportunity to continue these same principles that attract new customers as well as previous customers to shop locally. Bobby (pup pictured below) does his part in greeting and helping customers sample the futon mattresses! Carolina Futons gives each customer the attention and service only an in-store visit can provide. We take the time to show and demonstrate our quality wood collection of Murphy cabinets, futon frames, and platform beds and accessories; our selection of Otis high-density foam mattresses; and over 700 swatches of our premium lines of fabric for choosing a custom futon cover. We welcome you to our store to discover a new experience in shopping for furniture for your home, office, RV, vacation home, or rental property.

# About Us

Richard and Liz Sims started Sims' Futon Gallery (now Carolina Futons) in 1991 in the city of Hendersonville, NC. The Sims gained a loyal customer base with their honesty and integrity, fair pricing, great selection of high-quality products, and outstanding service in their 30 years in business. After making the decision to retire in 2021, Brenda and Howard Deal saw the opportunity to continue these same principles that attract new customers as well as previous customers to shop locally. Bobby (pup pictured below) does his part in greeting and helping customers sample the futon mattresses!

Carolina Futons gives each customer the attention and service only an in-store visit can provide. We take the time to show and demonstrate our quality wood collection of Murphy cabinets, futon frames, and platform beds and accessories; our selection of Otis high-density foam mattresses; and over 700 swatches of our premium lines of fabric for choosing a custom futon cover. We welcome you to our store to discover a new experience in shopping for furniture for your home, office, RV, vacation home, or rental property.

pages.title: Moonshadow
pages.description:
Our most popular ultra-premium all-foam constructed futon that is soft, plush, and cushy, yet is very supportive.

Characteristics:
- Comfort Level - An elite plush, soft feel
- Durability - 10-12+ years, designed for everyday use
- Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8" border)
- Weight - Per full size, 45 pounds
- Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed (please note if primary purpose is for a bed)
- Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame

Construction:
1. A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture.
2. 10" of high quality 2-pound density convoluted and flat foam provides the soft cushy feel of Otis Bed’s most popular futon mattress.
3. The flame-retardant rayon wrap protects the mattress and gives a clean finished look.
4. Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel.
5. The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover.

Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon.
Box Edges: For a TRUE reading of thickness.
Overstuffed: Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping.
Tape Edge Closure: Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look."
Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. The "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.

pages.title: Bali
pages.description:
The Bali futon frame offers a traditional slatted arm design that continues down the arm to encapsulate the sides. This frame is available with the Nesting Body Classic Design that features three positions: sofa, reclined, and bed.

Two unique finishes are available: Skye and Brushed Driftwood
Available in Full and Queen

pages.title: Mattress Protector
pages.description:
Protect It™ Futon Protectors

New protective technology makes Protect It™ the ultimate mattress protector.
The waterproof, breathable, anti-allergen, dust mite barrier is laminated between two layers of smooth, durable 100% polyester fabric for ultimate performance and comfort.
- Waterproof
- Breathable
- Quiet
- Blocks allergens and dust mites
- Washing won’t weaken the barrier
- 10 Year Product Limited Warranty
Available in Twin (6″ loft), Full (7″ loft), and Queen (7″ loft) sizes.

pages.title: Ruskin
pages.description:
The Ruskin futon frame features a simple yet elegant design of Mission-style vertical slats topped off by a slightly curving arm rest.

Available in two finishes: Cherry and Dark Chocolate.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Winchester
pages.description:
The Winchester futon frame has a very appealing traditional mission-style design with solid steam-bent arms.

Available in four finishes: Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Eureka
pages.description:
The Eureka futon frame offers pleasing simplicity - no arms in your way!

Available in five finishes: Black Walnut, Cherry, Dark Chocolate, Natural, and White.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Kingston
pages.description:
The Kingston futon frame is trim and stylish, featuring a patented Arts and Crafts stick-and-rail pattern in the arm.

Available in four finishes: Black Walnut, Cherry, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Trinity
pages.description:
The Trinity reflects the classic futon frame with its straightforward design, well-suited for most home styles and offering exceptional value.

Available in four finishes: Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Asheville
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

Although a spring system isn’t needed for support in this high-performance futon mattress, the Asheville offers familiar comfort for those who prefer the feel of an innerspring mattress.

pages.title: Getting it Home
pages.description:
We don't add the cost of assembly and delivery into our prices, which means that you don't pay for services you don't need. Instead, we offer service levels to meet your individual needs. We'll also be here to answer any questions you might have after you take your purchase home. At Carolina Futons, we don't add the cost of assembly and delivery into our prices, which means that you don't pay for services you don't need. Instead, we offer service levels to meet your individual needs. All of our frames come with a pack of Grip Strips to keep your mattress in place, at no additional charge. We'll also be here to answer any questions you might have after you take your purchase home regarding assembly and/or mechanics of your frame. Do It Yourself Are you an "I can do it myself" kind of person? Then you'll save the most by taking your purchase home and assembling it yourself with included box instructions or viewing the instructional videos online, available on our FAQ page . Most futon frames are simple to build and will fit in a small SUV or truck. You can also pick up your mattress in its original box or we can unbox for you to carry out (tied up vertically and wrapped in plastic). We will help you carry out and load your purchases into your vehicle. Home Drop Off If you want to assemble your purchase yourself but don't have a suitable vehicle for transporting, we can deliver your items to your home. We can also deliver your mattress and take away your old mattress for a $10 landfill fee. Delivery rates are based on mileage from our store. In-Store Assembly Another option is to have us assemble your frame in our store for you to pick up and take home. You can also pick up your mattress in its original box or we can unbox for you to carry out (tied up vertically and wrapped in plastic). We will help you carry out and load your purchases into your vehicle. A full-sized pickup truck or van is recommended for transporting an assembled frame and/or mattress. Our fee for this service is $40.00, with a 24-hour notice required. Premium White Glove Service A final option is to have us assemble/set up your frame in your home by our professional, courteous delivery personnel to your room of choice. This includes applying Grip Strips to your frame, putting your mattress protector and/or cover on your mattress, reviewing and demonstrating converting your frame or cabinet, final performance inspections, and removing all packaging and clean up area. Our fee for this service is $60.00, plus delivery rate based on the mileage from our store to your home. Delivery Rates (based on address/Google Maps) Minimum local charge (up to approx. 10-mile radius from our store) $25.00 Contact us for rates or input your zip code when adding items to your cart for pricing. We are currently in the process of optimizing this function and all radius/zip code information may not be available yet. Assembly & Delivery

At Carolina Futons, we don't add the cost of assembly and delivery into our prices, which means that you don't pay for services you don't need. Instead, we offer service levels to meet your individual needs. All of our frames come with a pack of Grip Strips to keep your mattress in place, at no additional charge. We'll also be here to answer any questions you might have after you take your purchase home regarding assembly and/or mechanics of your frame.

Do It Yourself
Are you an "I can do it myself" kind of person? Then you'll save the most by taking your purchase home and assembling it yourself with included box instructions or viewing the instructional videos online, available on our  [FAQ page](/faq). Most futon frames are simple to build and will fit in a small SUV or truck. You can also pick up your mattress in its original box or we can unbox for you to carry out (tied up vertically and wrapped in plastic). We will help you carry out and load your purchases into your vehicle.

Home Drop Off
If you want to assemble your purchase yourself but don't have a suitable vehicle for transporting, we can deliver your items to your home. We can also deliver your mattress and take away your old mattress for a $10 landfill fee. Delivery rates are based on mileage from our store.

In-Store Assembly
Another option is to have us assemble your frame in our store for you to pick up and take home. You can also pick up your mattress in its originalbox or we can unbox for you to carry out (tied up vertically and wrapped in plastic). We will help you carry out and load your purchases into your vehicle. A full-sized pickup truck or van is recommended for transporting an assembled frame and/or mattress. Our fee for this service is $40.00, with a 24-hour notice required.

Premium White Glove Service
A final option is to have us assemble/set up your frame in your home by our professional, courteous delivery personnel to your room of choice. This includes applying Grip Strips to your frame, putting your mattress protector and/or cover on your mattress, reviewing and demonstrating converting your frame or cabinet, final performance inspections, and removing all packaging and clean up area. Our fee for this service is $60.00, plus delivery rate based on the mileage from our store to your home.

Delivery Rates (based on address/Google Maps)
Minimum local charge (up to approx. 10-mile radius from our store) $25.00
Contact us for rates or input your zip code when adding items to your cart for pricing. We are currently in the process of optimizing this function and all radius/zip code information may not be available yet.

# Assembly & Delivery

pages.title: Albany, Trinity & Eureka Arms
pages.description:
Owner written blog to help in finding the right mattress for you Choosing Between Albany, Trinity & Eureka Frame Styles When choosing a Night & Day futon frame, the three arm styles of Albany, Trinity, and Eureka have very similar features but differ in the following ways: The Albany arm is one of the smallest arms at 2-½” wide and 22-⅛” high. The middle of the arm is open, with a 1-3/4" top base and a 3-1/2" bottom base. The front leg is horizontal with two buttons on the side (buttons are not present on this display arm) and the back leg is vertical with two buttons. Albany is available in Black Walnut, Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, and Natural. The Trinity arm has basically the same features as Albany but has eight slats in the middle of the top and bottom base. Trinity is available in Black Walnut, Cherry, Chocolate (pictured), and Natural. NOTE: The Monterey frame (not pictured) has three slats in the middle instead of eight. When choosing a Night & Day futon fThe Eureka is a simple and slim arm at 1-1/2" wide and 21-1/4" high. The middle of the arm is open, with a 3-3/4" top base and a 2-1/4" bottom base. A decorative back piece sits on the end of the top base, flush against the back leg. Both legs are vertical with two buttons on each side. Eureka is available in Black Walnut, Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, Natural, and White.rame, the three arm styles of Albany, Trinity, and Eureka have very similar features but differ in the following ways:

## Choosing Between Albany, Trinity & EurekaFrame Styles

When choosing a Night & Day futon frame, the three arm styles of Albany, Trinity, and Eureka have very similar features but differ in the following ways:

The Albany arm is one of the smallest arms at 2-½” wide and 22-⅛” high. The middle of the arm is open, with a 1-3/4" top base and a 3-1/2" bottom base. The front leg is horizontal with two buttons on the side (buttons are not present on this display arm) and the back leg is vertical with two buttons. Albany is available in Black Walnut, Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, and Natural.

The Trinity arm has basically the same features as Albany but has eight slats in the middle of the top and bottom base.
Trinity is available in Black Walnut, Cherry, Chocolate (pictured), and Natural.

NOTE: The Monterey frame (not pictured) has three slats in the middle instead of eight.

When choosing a Night & Day futon f The Eureka is a simple and slim arm at 1-1/2" wide and 21-1/4" high. The middle of the arm is open, with a 3-3/4" top base and a 2-1/4" bottom base. A decorative back piece sits on the end of the top base, flush against the back leg. Both legs are vertical with two buttons on each side. Eureka is available in Black Walnut, Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, Natural, and White.rame, the three arm styles of Albany, Trinity, and Eureka have very similar features but differ in the following ways:

pages.title: Ruskin, Winchester & Winter Arms
pages.description:
Owner written blog to help in finding the right mattress for you Choosing Between Ruskin, Winchester & Winter Frame Styles When choosing a Night & Day futon frame, the three arm styles of Ruskin, Winchester, and Winter have very similar features but differ in the following ways: The Ruskin arm is 3-1/2" wide and slightly sloped, with 11 slats between a top base of 2-1/4" and a 3-1/2" bottom base. The arm at its tallest is 24-¾” high. The front and back legs are vertical with two buttons on each end. Ruskin is available in Cherry (pictured) and Chocolate. The Winchester arm is 3-1/2" wide and sloped downwards toward the back, with 10 slats between a top base of 1-1/2" and a 5-½” bottom base. The arm at its tallest is 25-½” high. The front leg is square with a decorative finial, and the back leg is vertical with two buttons. Winchester is available in Black Walnut (pictured), Cherry, Chocolate, and Natural. The Winter arm is 4-3/4" wide and sloped downwards toward the back, with 14 slats between a top base of 3-1/4" graduating to 1-1/4" toward the back arm. The front leg is a 2-½” square, and the back leg is a 3-1/2" rectangle. Both legs have a decorative finial with two buttons on each end. Winter is available in Black Walnut, Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, and Natural.

## Choosing Between Ruskin, Winchester & Winter Frame Styles

When choosing a Night & Day futon frame, the three arm styles of Ruskin, Winchester, and Winter have very similar features but differ in the following ways:

The Ruskin arm is 3-1/2" wide and slightly sloped, with 11 slats between a top base of 2-1/4" and a 3-1/2" bottom base. The arm at its tallest is 24-¾” high. The front and back legs are vertical with two buttons on each end. Ruskin is available in Cherry (pictured) and Chocolate.

The Winchester arm is 3-1/2" wide and sloped downwards toward the back, with 10 slats between a top base of 1-1/2" and a 5-½” bottom base. The arm at its tallest is 25-½” high. The front leg is square with a decorative finial, and the back leg is vertical with two buttons. Winchester is available in Black Walnut (pictured), Cherry, Chocolate, and Natural.

The Winter arm is 4-3/4" wide and sloped downwards toward the back, with 14 slats between a top base of 3-1/4" graduating to 1-1/4" toward the back arm. The front leg is a 2-½” square, and the back leg is a 3-1/2" rectangle. Both legs have a decorative finial with two buttons on each end. Winter is available in Black Walnut, Cherry (pictured), Chocolate, and Natural.

pages.title: Mesa 5000
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Mesa 5000 is an ultra-firm platform bed mattress with 9" of firm high-quality convoluted two-pound foam, creating the firmest futon mattress in the Otis Bedline. Two layers of polyester fiber batting allows the mattress to give "just a little."

pages.title: FAQ
pages.description:
# Frequently
Asked Questions

## If an item is out-of-stock, what is the turnaround time?

- [Although our inventory is limited due to storage space, most products can be ordered and received within 5-7 days. Please contact us!](/contact)

## What are my assembly & delivery options?

- [Please see our page:](/getting-it-home) [Getting It Home](/getting-it-home)

# Do you have assembly instructions for your products?

- # [Night & Day Assembly Instructions](https://ed8a7220-8b9b-438b-91f3-2c5b5e3bf0ed.usrfiles.com/ugd/e04e89_d8d6109f71a64430be6c31fb259c8460.pdf)

- # [Strata Assembly Instructions](https://stratafurniture.com/videos-and-assembly/)

## Do you have video instructions for assembly & operation of your products?

- ## [Night & Day Video Instructions](https://nightanddayfurniture.com/support/)

- ## [Strata Video Instructions](https://stratafurniture.com/videos-and-assembly/)

- ## [KD Video Instructions](https://kdframes.com/pages/assembly-videos)

## Does my product carry a warranty?

- ## [Night & Day Warranty](https://nightanddayfurniture.com/warranty-policy/)

- ## [Strata Warranty](https://www.stratafurniture.com/Warranty2013.pdf)

- ## [KD Warranty](https://kdframes.com/pages/about-us)

## What is your return policy?

## We are committed to your satisfaction and want to help you have the best possible shopping experience at Carolina Futons. If you are not satisfied with your purchase, we will gladly accept your return or exchange if the product is undamaged, unused, or unopened. A 10% restocking fee will apply to all returns. The setup and/or delivery fee, however, cannot be reimbursed after you receive the product(s) in your home. We cannot refund custom orders for covers, pillows, bedding, etc., once the item has been completed by the fabric company and/or shipped and received in the store. Please contact us at carolinafutons@gmail.com if you have any questions concerning this policy.

# How do I paint or stain my Unfinished Wood Frame?

# Please see the manufacturer's recommendations provided with your frame.

# Do you carry futon covers & pillows?

# We have a limited supply of hand-picked covers in stock and over 700 fabric swatches from two suppliers to complement your style. We also can order custom bedding, curtains, and outdoor cushions & fabrics. You can visit their websites before your visit to the store to preview their extensive selection of products:
- # [Siscovers](https://www.siscovers.com/product-category/fabric)
- # [Cottonbelle](https://cottonbelle.net/cottonbelle-fabrics/)

# What is an impactful way to thank Carolina Futons for excellent customer service?

# We value your thoughtful opinion and review of the products & services that were offered, and this really helps our small business to grow into the future. Thank you so much!

[Google Review](https://g.page/r/CdmJFg79aiTOEB0/review)

# Who is that very cute dog featured on your About Us page?

# Bobby McGee (bottom center) is the store greeter and mattress tester. He was adopted from Saving Grace in Wake Forest, NC, in 2017. He lives with his owners, Brenda & Howard Deal, and three fellow rescue dogs (left to right: Darling (also adopted from Saving Grace in 2017), Martin, (adopted from Granville County Animal Control Shelter in 2017), and Torro (adopted from a Texas shelter in 2010 by our son, Chris). Torro came to live with us permanently in 2018. 

Sadly, we lost Darling to kidney disease and Torro to bone cancer in November 2025. We miss them so much and no dog can replace their unique personalities. Darling was our "fish and chips girl," since she loved fish and would come running when she heard a chip bag being opened. She only played with Bobby and ignored the other pups. Torro could be called "the best dog ever," since he was just such an all-around awesome boy. He would hop around like Tigger every time you came in the door

Martin was extremely depressed after Torro's passing. He loved curling up next to him and keeping his face clean. We decided to adopt Rudy Rhoudini (previously known as Minion, Warthog, and Toasted Marshmallow) from Blue Ridge Humane Society in January 2026. He has helped Martin heal in the short time he has been with us, and he has been a great addition to our family (Eve is unsure at this point, but she has had some discussions with him...)

pages.title: Folding Platform Bed
pages.description: The Folding Platform Bed is stylish, convenient, and can be folded in half for convenient storage. Its low design, with legs that are tucked underneath, gives the appearance of a floating bed.

pages.title: Mesa 1000
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

Generous amounts (approx. 14″) of different combinations of highly-resilient foam and polyester fiber batting compressed to an 8” thickness creates dense yet soft support, whether sitting or sleeping. The Mesa 1000 can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame.

pages.title: Twin Trundle Bed
pages.description: The Twin Trundle has a slat spacing of 2.8 inches and is a perfect solution for extra bed space without taking up extra room. Equipped with four sturdy wheel for easy gliding and a weight limit of 400 pounds, this bed is designed to fit under all sizes, except for the King Nomad which comes with center legs.

pages.title: Sealy San Sebastian Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
Night & Day Furniture's newest cabinet bed, fully assembled and easy-to-convert! The Sealy San Sebastian Cabinet Bed features elegant acacia cabinet construction, solid hardwood build, and a space-saving design that transforms into a sideboard or TV stand when closed. This fully assembled cabinet bed includes a Sealy Posturepedic mattress with pressure-relieving memory foam for ultimate comfort and support. The soft knit fabric cover is easy to clean, ensuring long-lasting use.
Available in Twin, Full, and Queen sizes in Espresso and White finishes
Twin: 45.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H
Full: 63.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H
Queen: 69.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H

pages.title: KD Lounger
pages.description:
The KD Lounger frame is a lounger, chair, and bed all in one! This multi-functional solid wood frame features numerous convertible positions and rounded corners, which is both functionally and aesthetically pleasing. This Lounger will be a sturdy fixture in your home for years to come. Popular uses for this versatile frame in all its multiple positions includereading, gaming, as well as watching sports and TV. This Lounger also makes a great transitional bed for small children: You can even adjust the back to your favorite position and read your child to sleep at night.
Available in Twin, Full & Queen sizes.

Dimensions
Twin Size: 37"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)
Full Size: 52"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)
Queen Size: 58"W x 79"L x 10" H (bed position)

Sofa Height: Twin 31.5"; Full 31.5"; Queen 36.5"
Sofa Depth (extension underneath frame): 46" (all sizes)
Overall Lounger Depth (w/extension): 63" (all sizes)

pages.title: Studio Frame
pages.description:
The Studio frame is a no-frills approach for a couch that can quickly and effortlessly be converted to a bed. It features four adjustable positions as a couch, with a set of sturdy wheels in the back, making it easy to move. Simple and affordable, this frame is a popular choice for any casual setting that fits in with any urban decor. The sturdy wheels in the back make it easy to move, with four reclining positions available. The Studio frame is a popular choice for any casual setting. Available in Full and Queen sizes.

Dimensions
Full Size: 54.5"W x 74"L x 10"H (bed position)
Sofa Height: 31"
Sofa Depth: 37.5"

Queen Size: 59.5"W x 78"L x 10"H (bed position)
Sofa Height: 36"
Sofa Depth: 38"

pages.title: Murphy Cube Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
The Murphy Cube is available in four finishes: Cherry, Chocolate, Stonewash Gray, and White.
Features include:
- 3 locking hinges for opening and closing
- Solid hardwood construction
- Extra space for pillows and sheets in cabinet when closed
- Tri-fold 6-inch premium gel-infused memory foam Queen mattress

pages.title: Orion Murphy Cabinet Bed
pages.description: Night and Day's newest Murphy Cabinet Bed, available in twin and full. Easy and safe design with metal latches, fold-out legs, and safety buckle design. Includes a 4” gel-infused memory foam tri-fold mattress.

pages.title: Portofino
pages.description:
Never lose the remote again with the Portofino’s handy in-arm storage plus magazine rack. The solid design of this sofa is great for family rooms doing double duty.

Available in four finishes: Black Walnut, Cherry, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Trundle Bed
pages.description: Available in Cherry, Chocolate, Natural, Stonewash Gray, and White

pages.title: Nomad
pages.description: The Nomad Platform Bed is considered a minimalist Swedish design with an emphasis on functionality and simple, clean lines. This bed frame features a slat spacing of 2.8 inches to accommodate the requirements of just about any mattress on the market today. The Nomad has a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds and a platform height of 15 inches.

pages.title: Daisy Murphy Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
The Daisy Murphy Cabinet Bed is available in four finishes: Black Walnut, Buttercream, White, and Vintage White.
Features include:
- Higher sleep platform
- Built-in dual power/USB module
- Comes complete with flip-up trans
- Solid hardwood construction
- Shallow sleep enclosure
- Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused memory foam Queen mattress
- Large rolling storage drawer

pages.title: Murphy Express Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
Introducing the Murphy Express, the ultimate space-saving solution that seamlessly combines functionality and style. Crafted from the finest solid rubber wood, this exquisite cabinet bed requires no assembly and effortlessly transforms from an elegant cabinet to a luxurious queen-size bed in under 60 seconds. Embrace the richness of the Wildwood Brown finish, showcasing the beauty of handpicked wood with a unique rustic grain. Each piece is distinct, adding depth and individuality to your living space. With premium quality, quick and easy conversion, and tailored elegance, the Murphy Cabinet Express is the perfect addition to apartments, guest rooms, or any space where versatility matters, elevating your interior decor with timeless sophistication.

Available in twin, full, and queen sizes.
Available in three finishes: Wildwood Brown, Normandy, and Provence.

Features
- No Assembly Required.
- Built to last with durable hardwood construction.
- Enjoy ultimate comfort with an included plush memory foam mattress.
- Customize your ambiance with dimmable LED lamps.
- Stay connected with built-in USB and AC outlets.

pages.title: Mesa 3000
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Mesa 3000 has the same long-lasting support of the Mesa 1000 but with a firmer feel. Although the Mesa 3000 is very firm, it has just enough flexibility to allow for use on a bi-fold frame.

pages.title: Trelli
pages.description:
Trelli's concave flowing arm cap and railroad trestle foundation combines style and function to any room.

Available in Black Walnut and Warm Cherry. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

pages.title: Yuma
pages.description: The Yuma is a Dual-Comfort linked coil innerspring unit, with the full size having 390 coils and queen size having 493 coils, with 2" of 2 lbs. flat polyurethane soft foam, 3" of 2.2 lbs. of convoluted polyurethane foam, and 1.375" flat 2.2 lbs. of firm foam.

pages.title: Pagoda
pages.description:
Pagoda will be the centerpiece of your room, with its distinct and elegant, slightly curved arm cap.

Available in Black Walnut and Gray. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

pages.title: Poppy Murphy Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
The Poppy Murphy Cabinet Bed is available in five finishes: Brushed Driftwood, Seafoam, White Bark, Antique Blue, and Harvest Brown.
Features include:
Higher sleep platform
Comes complete with flip-up side trays
Built-in dual power/USB module
Solid hardwood construction
Shallow sleep enclosure
Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused memory foam Queen mattress
Large rolling storage drawer

pages.title: Denali
pages.description:
This mid-century modern style frame, with slightly-rounded wooden slats and sleek finishes, is designed to be both functional and fashionable anywhere you put it.

The Denali is available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Gray & Natural. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

pages.title: Sagebrush Murphy Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
The Sagebrush Murphy Cabinet Bed is available in two finishes: Dark Chocolate and Stonewash Gray.
Features include:
- Higher sleep platform
- Built-in dual power/USB module
- Comes complete with flip-up trays
- Solid hardwood construction
- Shallow sleep enclosure
- Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused memory foam Queen mattress
- Large rolling storage drawer

pages.title: Lexington
pages.description: The horizontal lines of this bed offer a sense of tranquility in your room. The Lexington has a slat spacing of 2.8" to accommodate the requirements of just about any mattress on the market today, a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds, and a platform height of 15 inches which can accommodate the Trundle or Rolling Drawers underneath.

pages.title: Dillon
pages.description:
Designed to optimize space even further, the Dillon's armless style allows for the cushion to be the statement piece.

Available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Black Walnut, Natural. and Gray. Available in Painted Black and Natural in Full and Queen Size only. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

pages.title: Gemini II
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Gemini provides the comforting support of latex-like foam to deliver exceptional comfort that envelops your entire body. Ultra-premium seating comfort; unmatchable sleeping comfort.

pages.title: Clover Murphy Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
The Clover Murphy Cabinet Bed is available in three finishes: Cherry, Chocolate, and White.
Features include:
- Solid hardwood construction
- Built-in dual power/USB module
- Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused memory foam Queen mattress
- Large rolling storage drawer
- Optional: Flip-up side trays

Every set comes complete with two sets of drawer knobs, to assemble per your choice, in either wood or metal (pewter finish).

pages.title: Tamarind
pages.description:
The Tamarind Bed is a handsome frame for every sort of lush and lovely bedding. The Tamarind makes a statement in any room and holds its own.

Bed rails can be set up in two heights of 13.5" or 16.3"

Available in Twin, Full, Queen, and King sizes

Available in Cherry, Chocolate, White, Natural, and Stonewash Gray finishes

pages.title: Durango
pages.description:
The Durango is a sturdy mission-style frame featuring clean lines and vertical slats, allowing it to blend in with any contemporary decor.

Available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, and Gray. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman

pages.title: Mountainaire
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Mounainaire is definitely an overachiever! It combines 14 inches of high-density and convulated foams compressed into an 8" case. This mattress provides a supportive plush comfort while sitting and a supportive firmer feeling for sleeping comfort. The Mountainaire remains the most popular choice for both stages of use.

pages.title: Alpine
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Alpine is a dual comfortmattress, overstuffed with 12” of high-density foams thermally rebonded for extra strength and poly batting compressed to an 8” thickness. The Alpine is a customer favorite for its comfort and affordability.

pages.title: Monterey
pages.description:
The Monterey features mission-style arms, evoking a clean and contemporary look.

Available in two fnishes: Cherry and Dark Chocolate.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Platform Bed Storage Drawers
pages.description: Available in Cherry, Chocolate, Natural, Stonewash Gray, and White

pages.title: Canby
pages.description:
The Canby has a traditional mission arm with sleek vertical lines and stylishly tapered legs.

Available in Warm Cherry, Black Walnut, and Gray. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

pages.title: Raleigh
pages.description:
The Raleigh offers a traditional tray arm design with slats that continue down the arm to encasulate the sides. This frame is available with the Nesting Body Classic Design that features three positions: sofa, reclined, and bed.

Available in two unique finishes: Brushed Driftwood and Skye.
Available in Full and Queen.

pages.title: Sedona
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Sedona is another Dual Comfort mattress that offers a firm side and a medium-firm side; the perfect choice for consumers seeking a firmer comfort level and affordability.

pages.title: Basic Platform Bed
pages.description:
The Basic Platform Bed is our entry-level model, perfect for loft living, the kid’s room, and for the guest room. The bed rails can be set up in two heights of 13.5" or 16.3."

Available in Cherry, Chocolate, White, Natural, and Stonewash Gray finishes

Available in Twin, Full, Queen, and King sizes

pages.title: Ekko Platform Bed
pages.description: The Ekko Platform Bed adds a clean and modern touch to your bedroom with its "floating bed" appearance. This bed frame features a slat spacing of 3 inches or less and a platform height of 10 inches. The Ekko has a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds.

pages.title: Ranchero Murphy Cabinet Bed
pages.description:
The newest addition to the Night & Day Murphy Cabinet Bed Line, the Ranchero Murphy Cabinet Bed has a rustic distressed finish with handsome antique brass hardware. Available in two finishes: Wildwood Brown and Wildwood Vintage White.
Features include:
- Higher sleep platform
- Built-in dual power/USB module
- Comes complete with flip-up side trays
- Solid hardwood construction
- Shallow sleep enclosure
- Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused memory foam Queen mattress
- Large rolling storage drawer

pages.title: Cambridge
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Cambridge is our star entry in the Simple Comfort line, which offers a soft-medium feel and affordability.

pages.title: Solstice
pages.description:
The Solstice Bed totally defines the room it is in. Its Craftsman pattern of latticework set within handsome tapered legs is as satisfying as it is beautiful.

Bed rails can be set up in two heights of 13.5" or 16.3"

Available in Twin, Full, Queen, and King sizes

Available in Cherry, Chocolate, Natural, and Stonewash Gray finishes

*Please note the Cherry and Natural images show the older "P" series partial footboard. All beds now feature a full footboard panel (original "K" series). Please contact us for any clarification.

pages.title: Chandler
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Chandler is a pressure-relieving memory foammattress that conforms to and supports for individualized comfort.

pages.title: Flagstaff
pages.description:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

The Flagstaff is a perfect blend of 9” of both soft and medium firm high-density convoluted foam plus 2” of 2.5-pound density block foam compressed to 8” to create a nearly perfect “medium” feel.
